metadata.title: Quick 2v1 Mid Hold with Clean Shots in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch a tight mid fight where smart positioning and calm aim secure a fast double kill. Timing and patience win the round here.
What’s your favorite mid control tactic?

Drop your favorite mid fight moments in the comments!
